'''Kobbahn''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the border of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It was the location of one of the earliest [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cells in the days following the declaration of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

{{Planet-stub}}
